rationale: C24 was a ghost cycle — all 3 features (BiomeRadial, faction dashboard, biome_key passthrough) were claimed done in status files but code was never pushed via MCP. Same pattern as C8/C9/C16. This cycle implemented them for real, with code review catching 2 MEDIUM bugs (missing signal disconnect, double-press fallthrough) both fixed before push.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C25: verify BiomeRadial open/close lifecycle (press PARTIR → radial appears → select biome → adventure launches). Verify faction dashboard initial values populate correctly from store.state.meta.factions. Verify biome_key passthrough works with BiomeWalkConfigs for non-broceliande biomes (landes_bruyere, cotes_sauvages etc — may need config entries). Feature candidates: add maturity score display to BiomeRadial (show lock/unlock state per biome), or add biome-specific walkConfig for landes_bruyere.
